_note: Adobe App Builder. Toolchain: Node + aio (IMS). The org → project → workspace cascade is LIVE from `aio console` (not registry data). AUTH: REUSE the existing aio session — the `ims` step checks `aio where` and only runs `aio login` if NOT authenticated; it NEVER forces a re-login or logout. Templates come from the registry baseline.

actions.label: Create a new App Builder app

steps.label: Adobe sign-in — reuses the existing aio session if present; never forces a re-login
Created. Run `aio app dev` to start the local runtime, or `aio app deploy` to ship.
